summary: The video shows a city street with multiple vehicles moving in different directions. A white SUV travels alongside the ego-vehicle, while a bus moves ahead. Other cars populate the roadway, including a blue sedan on the right side.

events_timeline.event: Multiple vehicles are present on the road, including a white SUV traveling alongside the ego-vehicle and a bus moving ahead.

uncertainties: The precise speed and direction of the buses and sedans cannot be determined.

risk_assessment.why: There are no apparent collisions, near misses, or hazardous interactions among the vehicles.
